summary: Testing FunnyRent 2.1 Stage 15.3 v2 Supabase APIs and frontend integration. All v2 API endpoints return 502 errors preventing data loading on homepage and test-db page. Database connection failed.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 502 'The preview environment is not responding' instead of JSON responses
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all v2 API functionality - categories, listings, districts, exchange rates, auth, admin stats, partner stats, promo codes, profile

critical_bugs.issue: Database connection FAILED - Supabase URL shows 'Not configured'
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot seed database or verify Supabase connection

critical_bugs.issue: Backend service configured to run from /app/backend directory which doesn't exist (this is Next.js app)
critical_bugs.impact: Backend service in FATAL state, but this may not be needed for Next.js API routes

integration_issues.issue: Categories section is empty - no category cards displayed
Shows 'Найдено: 0 объектов' (Found: 0 objects) with permanent loading spinner
Category and district dropdowns show placeholder text instead of API data
Exchange rates not loading - may affect price display

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Database Connection: FAILED' and 'Supabase URL: Not configured'

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with UI layout
Test-db page displays with proper styling
Frontend service runs in development mode
Basic navigation and page routing works
Supabase configuration files exist with credentials
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: All v2 API routes return 502 errors. Need to investigate why Next.js API routes are not being served properly. Check if environment variables are loaded correctly in runtime, verify Supabase connection, and ensure API routes are configured properly. May need to rebuild or restart services with correct configuration.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (UI loads but no data from APIs)
